name: app-lifecycle
summary: Force-update / min-version gate, maintenance mode, and a well-timed in-app review prompt — all driven by a public Supabase config row.
postInstall: npx expo install expo-application expo-store-review expo-linking
Apply supabase/0010_app_config.sql (public-read app_config; you edit it from the dashboard)
Set storeUrls (App Store / Play) in the config row so the update gate can deep-link to the store.
Wrap routes in <LifecycleGate> to block on update-required / maintenance.
Call maybeAskForReview() after a positive moment (a completed task), never on launch.
